name: Cargas Laftrius
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial female wearing a set of leather armor consisting of a cuirass, greaves, gauntlets, and boots.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: dutiful, service-oriented

Role: Healer and member of the Fighters Guild.

Home Location Information: Formerly associated with the Fighters Guild. Last known assignment placed her at Forsaken Mine, south of Leyawiin.

Equipment and Abilities: Equipped with leather armor. Served the Fighters Guild in a healing capacity during field assignments.

Personality – Guild Healer: Cargas Laftrius served as a healer within a Fighters Guild expedition tasked with clearing Forsaken Mine of trolls. Her role placed her alongside Viranus Donton and other guild members during what was intended to be a routine mission.

Fate: Cargas Laftrius was found dead in a dead-end northern section of the first area of Forsaken Mine, near the body of Mattius Wotrus. She was one of several Fighters Guild members killed during the failed expedition, indicating that the mission encountered unexpected and overwhelming danger.
author: Bethesda
